title: GraphQL get all company boards
excerpt:
Hi, 
as an administrator I should be able to see all boards, right? 
With this query I only get the boards I have subscribed to. 
boards { 
id 
name 
} 
I haven’t found a way to do this on monday.com either?

posts.author: Thean (Thean Oberhollenzer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
as an administrator I should be able to see all boards, right?
With this query I only get the boards I have subscribed to.

boards {
id
name
}

I haven’t found a way to do this on monday.com either?

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Thean,
What types of boards did you try to query?
You should be able to see all main boards and private/shareable boards you are subscribed to.
Being an administrator doesn’t give you permissions for other users private/shareable boards.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
